channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260417.1)
item.description:
What's New

fix: correct Modern Style tone placement for triple vowels

Bug: When Modern Style is ON, tone marks are misplaced for triple vowel

sequences like "oay" and "uây":

- "xoáy" → typed as "xoaý" (tone on 'y' instead of 'a')

- "uầy" → typed as "ùây" (tone on 'u' instead of 'â')

Root cause (2 issues in handleModernMark):

  1. Triple vowel block only listed 4 specific patterns (oai, uyu, oeo,

uya), missing others like "oay". Replaced with catch-all rule: ALL

triple vowels place tone on the middle vowel (Vietnamese phonetic rule).

  1. Rule 3.2 (ia/ya/ua/ưu) had no vowelCount guard, causing it to

override triple vowel positions (e.g., "uây" matched "ua" pattern).

Added vowelCount != 3 guard.

Also added tone position recalculation as final pass in

VNWordBuffer.rebuildStateFromKeyStrokes() to handle cases where vowels

are added after the tone key.

Verified all 12 Vietnamese triple vowel sequences:

iêu, yêu, oai, oay, oeo, uây, uôi, uya, uyê, uyu, ươi, ươu

Added 15 test cases covering bug fixes and comprehensive coverage.

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
